articles.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Truce Comes Under Strain: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Stocks fell, bond yields rose and oil rallied after President Donald Trump thrust geopolitical risks back into focus by saying the ceasefire between the US and Iran may be over.

articles.title: US Stock Futures Slide After Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is Over
articles.summary: US equity futures fell as investors turned risk averse after President Donald Trump said the tentative ceasefire with Iran has ended, fueling concerns of a renewal in fighting.

articles.title: Omani Shipping Firm Asyad’s Owner Is Said to Weigh Stake Sale
articles.summary: A conglomerate backed by Oman’s sovereign wealth fund is looking to sell a stake worth in the shipping business it listed last year, people familiar with the matter said.

articles.title: Ather Is Said to Plan $200 Million India Fundraise
articles.summary: Ather Energy Ltd. is planning a share sale to institutional investors as early as next week, according to people familiar with the matter, to raise as much as $157 million.

articles.title: European Bonds Slide as Oil Spike Reignites Inflation Fears

articles.title: Stocks Drop, Oil Jumps After Trump Says Ceasefire with Iran Is "Over" | Bloomberg Brief 07/08/2026

articles.title: Oman Fertilizer Firm Defies War Worries and Surges 23% on Debut
articles.summary: Oman India Fertiliser Co. jumped more than 23% on its Muscat trading debut after raising 261 million Omani rials ($678 million) in the region’s largest initial public offering of the year.

articles.title: Romania Keeps EU’s Highest Rates With Inflation Stuck Above 10%
articles.summary: Romania held interest rates at the highest level in the European Union as policymakers tackle double digit inflation in an economy on the verge of a recession.

articles.title: Susquehanna Puts Up $500 Million for ‘Hedging’ World Cup Games
articles.summary: Susquehanna International Group has lined up $500 million to work with institutions that want to use prediction markets to hedge the economic risks associated with various World Cup outcomes.

articles.title: AI Firm Zhipu to Sell $4 Billion of Shares After 1,500% Rally
articles.summary: Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu is seeking to raise about $4 billion from a share sale after its stock soared almost 1,500% since a January listing in Hong Kong.
